# OPWA — Onchain Proof of World Asset
# AI Agent Index (llms.txt)
# https://op-real-estate-platform.vercel.app/

## Project
OPWA is a real estate tokenization protocol built natively on Bitcoin Layer 1 via OP_NET smart contracts. It enables fractional ownership of premium real estate through OP-20 fungible tokens and OP-721 NFTs — without bridges, sidechains, or wrapped assets.

## Live Site
- Frontend: https://op-real-estate-platform.vercel.app/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Opwabtc/OPWABTC

## Pages
- /             — Homepage / Landing
- /dashboard    — Live dashboard with block height, wallet balance, available properties
- /marketplace  — Buy/sell fractional property tokens
- /portfolio    — Holdings, yield earned, portfolio chart
- /simulator    — Investment yield simulator
- /admin/mint   — Admin panel: mint new PropertyNFT (owner only)

## Smart Contracts (OP_NET Testnet)
- OPWACoin (OP-20): Platform utility token OPWA | Max 21M supply | 8 decimals
- PropertyNFT (OP-721): Unique property title NFTs | Owner-minted | Fractionalization supported
- YieldDistributor: Rental income distribution (in development)
- Addresses: See /docs/testnet-deployments

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS, Zustand, React Router
- Blockchain: OP_NET Testnet (Bitcoin L1), opnet SDK, @btc-vision/transaction, @btc-vision/bitcoin
- Wallet: OP_WALLET (primary), UniSat, XVerse via @btc-vision/walletconnect
- Deploy: Vercel

## Documentation
- /docs/technical-architecture — OP_NET execution model, contract lifecycle
- /docs/tokenomics — OPWA token distribution, yield model
- /docs/CONTRACTS — Full smart contract API reference
- /docs/testnet-deployments — Deployed contract addresses
- /docs/security-model — Security architecture

- Twitter: @opwabtc
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/Opwabtc/OPWABTC/issues
